verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's never been a better time for us To find out all the truth for our age and where we are; There's so many who depend on what He's done or what He'll do, I want to know what God is doing now.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Not I was, not I will be, but I am, To what God's promised for today I'll say "Amen." And He's a living God and has a present plan, Cause He's not I was, not I will be, but I am.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I love to think about the future home of the earthly Bride, But as for now what did He say? And I can't live on some old mannah, From all the ages that's gone by; I've got to know what God has promised for today.
